title: A concrete DFS does at most |V| vertex expansions
statement_informal: A concrete fuel-based DFS on an adjacency-list graph keeps its visited set distinct (NoDup) and bounded by |V|, so the number of vertex expansions is at most |V| (the V term of O(V+E), for an actual algorithm).

cost_model.notes: Each vertex is marked at most once; visited NoDup + bounded => length <= |V|.

references: Knuth, TAOCP graph algorithms; depth-first search and the O(V+E) bound.
